summary:
PROPHETIC WARNINGS OF PLAGUES AND BIOLOGICAL WARFARE: Brandon shares prophetic visions and dreams from individuals such as Kent Christmas, Dana Coverstone, and Bonnie Jones regarding an impending, severe plague and economic collapse. Brandon explicitly states that a biological agent, which will be significantly more severe than the Coronavirus, is being developed in laboratories to be released upon the nations as an act of war. He references Bonnie Jones's vision associating this biological warfare with a dragon representing China, and recalls his own previous vision where a biological agent was planned for release starting in Europe. According to Brandon, these plagues will cause mass casualties, though believers will receive divine protection, which he notes was shown to him as a glow of honey surrounding them.

PHYSICAL PREPARATION AND FITNESS: Brandon discusses his recent focus on physical fitness and bodily health. He explicitly details his efforts in lifting weights to bulk up and the challenges he faces in balancing his nutritional intake with his workout routines. Brandon notes that this level of physical training and taking care of his body is a completely new endeavor for him and his family.

ENVIRONMENTAL CATASTROPHES AND FAMINE: Brandon recounts visions of imminent environmental disasters and widespread famine affecting both food and the Word. He describes sights of extreme drought conditions stretching from the West Coast to the East Coast, specifically mentioning the Lubbock, Texas area and Mexico. In these visions, he observed idle John Deere tractors unable to plant crops due to a complete lack of water. Brandon states that earthquakes, floods, and fires will severely disrupt the agricultural food chain, while infrastructure failures, such as damaged bridges and gas shortages, will prevent transport trucks from crossing. He reports being told by Jesus face-to-face that this major shaking is intended to bring about humbling and an awakening.

ECONOMIC DESERT AND BARTERING SYSTEMS: Brandon details multiple dreams from Dana Coverstone depicting a total economic collapse characterized as an economic desert. He recounts explicit imagery from these dreams, including empty ATMs, malfunctioning checkout scanners, and streets littered with trash where people carry brown paper grocery bags. Furthermore, Brandon describes a complete shift away from modern commerce to a primitive bartering system on Wall Street, where people trade physical items such as chickens, rusty hand tools, unwashed eggs, and ammunition. He notes that in this scenario, modern vehicles are replaced by bicycles and skateboards, power tools are entirely absent, and this period of severe economic hardship is stated to last for a duration of four years, symbolized in the dream by four oak trees.

PRACTICAL PREPAREDNESS AND FUTURE CHURCH DYNAMICS: Brandon relays practical instructions for navigating the coming hardships. He explicitly urges his audience to set aside cash, food supplies such as ramen noodles, and essential resources like water, candles, and heating sources. Alongside the predictions of great darkness and closed mega-churches shifting into home-based congregations, Brandon states there will be a financial outpouring designed specifically to provide for the body of Christ. He emphasizes the necessity of being alert and prepared for these specific conditions without operating out of fear.
rawData: [September 02, 2024]-[Putting the pieces together - dreams and visions from other warnings of what’s to come]-[https://youtu.be/5zzNSGo9zXk]-[Good morning, family. How are you all doing today? I have some things on my heart. I found this prophetic word from Kent Christmas and a dream from Dana Coverstone. The Lord has really put Pastor Dana Coverstone on my heart—specifically some of the things He has shown him in these dreams. I've been going back through some of the past dreams from basically three or four years ago. I really believe he heard the Lord on many of those; some can be prayed away, and some can't. The videos I'm going to show you are very important because they go alongside what the Lord showed me about the plague that's coming and the economic collapse. Before this year is out, the death angel is being loosed upon the Earth. What they concocted and created in laboratories called Coronavirus will pale in comparison, saith the Lord, to the spirit that the death angel will loose upon the nations. It will not touch My people. For the first virus, the enemy brought it against the innocent and the old, but this, saith God, will not touch the church. Some will fall on your right hand, as I declared in Psalm 91, and they will fall on your left hand, but it shall not come nigh unto thy dwelling. What you just saw was him saying a thousand shall fall at your side and ten thousand at your right hand. If you remember what I said, it goes alongside what the Lord showed me about a glow of honey around the believers. We would go in and lay hands on people in cots. I saw cots full of bodies and people dying of this virus; it was very tragic. I've told everyone about what the Lord showed me, so I won't go over it all again. I'm just showing you that there are prophetic voices hearing that another plague and pestilence are coming. The Lord was also talking to me about getting in shape. I've been lifting weights, trying to bulk up and take care of my body more. It's been a challenge balancing eating with working out, but I'm learning a lot on YouTube. My family were not people who worked out, so this is all new. This is Bonnie Jones, Bob Jones's widow. I believe she hears the Lord, and she got a prophetic visitation about a week ago. This is a fresh video where the Lord gave her a very stern prophetic warning. She heard, 'Beware the dragon,' followed by 'biological warfare.' She associated the dragon with China. Biological warfare is the deliberate use of disease-causing agents like bacteria or toxins to kill or incapacitate as an act of war. I believe China is cooking up another virus that will be more deadly. Remember when I told you I saw the dragon? In my World War II video, I said the dragon was hiding behind a black rock, waiting for a new season. The dragon represented the COVID. I was shown in the spirit that they were taking a biological agent in a lab to release on the people, starting in Europe. I warned about that in a video called 'The Dream That I Had.' Back in April, the Lord told me He was sending another plague and that cataclysmic things would happen. He said a line of demarcation has been drawn. Calamity is coming because of disobedience to His word. Famine is imminent—not just of food, but of the Word. There has been a chokehold in America, and now He is going to release it. I'm not 100% sure what He means by a famine of food, but catastrophes like earthquakes, floods, and fires will affect our food chain. In a vision, I saw John Deere tractors sitting idle with no crops planted from the West Coast to the East Coast. There was an extreme drought. The Lord said three times, 'There's no water.' I saw the Lubbock area, Texas, and through Mexico where it was extremely dry. We need to be wise, not fearful. We cannot stop judgment, but we can lessen it through prayer. Jesus told me face-to-face that this major shaking will take place for a humbling and an awakening. We will be a sheep nation because of the prayers of our founding fathers. I've seen bridges and earthquakes preventing trucks from crossing, and I've seen gas shortages. Pastor Dana also had a dream about an 'Economic Desert.' He was at the bottom of an ocean, 2,000 feet below sea level. He saw a billboard that said 'Economic Desert.' He saw life acting normal, then suddenly changing. Cars were parked, trash was everywhere, and people were carrying brown paper grocery bags. Eventually, they had no bags, and ATMs were empty. At a checkout line, the scanner wasn't working, and a man with an empty wallet began to cry. I'm encouraging you to build the kingdom of God and ask Him what you need to do. Have some cash and resources set aside. It doesn't have to be a lot, but we are headed for hard times. I believe in miracles, but Christians will face hard things. It's not an easy-peasy life. Dana also had a dream about Wall Street and bartering. He saw people trading chickens and tools. One man traded shotgun shells for chickens; a lady traded hammers for screws. Someone traded a Rolex for horses. There were no vehicles, only bikes and skateboards. In the dream, tables were bowing under the weight of goods like unwashed eggs and rusty hand tools. I saw wooden awls and hand drills, but no power tools. The man with the shotgun shells was barefoot and used his shirt as a bag. A man representing Jesus was there and said, 'You are not as prepared as you need to be. Hearken to My word. Embrace, don't barter with My word, as you will come up short.' This situation might last longer than you think. I saw four oak trees representing four years. People were not ready for the first year, and by the end, they were bartering for ammo. If you live in a major city, think about what it would be like if you didn't have bread for your children. Pastor Dana is an elderly man, probably in his late 50s. I feel an urgency to warn you. I've seen great darkness over 2025, but also a financial outpouring for the body of Christ to provide. Mega-churches may close and move to home churches. Ask the Lord what you need for your house. Maybe it's Ramen noodles or a week's worth of food. Even FEMA says to have three days of water. Don't operate out of fear, but be alert. Every time I look for the prayers of the saints to change the direction. In 2015, the Lord gave more time, but this time He says it will manifest. I hope this video brings your attention to these things. It's smart to have candles and a source of heat for the winter. Jesus is coming back. Father, I thank You for everyone here. You always provided for me, even if it was just a piece of bologna. We command fear to bow its knee. You are El Elyon, the Most High, and Jehovah Jireh. We believe for a hundredfold return and supernatural multiplication. We speak to the seeds and the harvest. We believe for acceleration, signs, and wonders. Peace be with you. Shalom.]
